---
title: "DaMIfLL at the FAIRagro Community Summit"
date: "2026-03-05"
image: ../assets/FAIRagro-summit.jpg
categories: [FAIRagro, FAIR data, community]
description: "DaMIfLL working group members attended the FAIRagro community summit, engaging with the FAIR data community in Agricultural research."
---

In March the Working group attended the FAIRagro community summit, joining researchers and data infrastructure specialists to discuss FAIR data principles in the agricultural and
landscape sciences.

The event provided valuable opportunities to exchange ideas, identify common challenges,
and explore potential collaborations between DaMIfLL and FAIRagro initiatives.
